headline: The spring housing market is on, but mortgage rates just shot higher. Here's what to know.
summary: This spring's housing market is on, but economic headwinds are pushing back most of the advantage that buyers have gained over the past year in affordability.

raw.headline: The spring housing market is on, but mortgage rates just shot higher. Here's what to know.
raw.summary: This spring's housing market is on, but economic headwinds are pushing back most of the advantage that buyers have gained over the past year in affordability.

headline: Lennar Corp Saw Profits Fall in Its Latest Quarter. Is It Time To Buy the Dip on This Leading Homebuilder?
summary: The long-term outlook for housing hasn't changed.
